title: Nicolau's Copper Tools
description: A datapack / mod that adds copper tools!
body:
A datapack / mod that adds **copper tools** to the game.

This adds:

- Copper Sword
- Copper Pickaxe
- Copper Axe
- Copper Shovel
- Copper Hoe

Unfortunately as this is a datapack, the added items aren't in the creative inventory and must be either given by crafting or commands. Same goes for the mod version.

I will also add compatiblity with Diminishing Tools from Vanilla Tweaks as well as update it to be closer to the Copper Tools from vanilla. Both of these things are gonna take months because there's other things I'm making instead of this
